channel.title: Nvidia on Archive 03
channel.description: Recent content in Nvidia on Archive 03

item.title: Beyond NVIDIA: Is Broadcom the Real Hidden Powerhouse of AI Semiconductors?
item.description: While NVIDIA is the face of the AI GPU battlefield, Broadcom is the quiet infrastructure giant controlling custom AI accelerators and networking. We analyze the growth logic and valuation risks of $AVGO, which recorded Q1 AI revenue of $8.4 billion (+106%) and expects $10.7 billion in Q2.

item.title: Should You Buy Nvidia Now? 2026 Stock Price Outlook & Analysis
item.description: Nvidia (NVDA) has dropped over 16% from its 52-week high. While 38 Wall Street analysts still maintain a $270 price target, China export restrictions and tariff shocks are real. Mew, Kurumi, and Mikael break down everything from FY2026 annual results to the next-gen Rubin GPU roadmap.

item.title: NVIDIA ($NVDA): Is the Next Big Thing Humanoid Robots?
item.description: NVIDIA, the king of AI chips, is making a serious move into the humanoid robot market. Three experts engage in an in-depth discussion about NVIDIA’s grand plan to generate revenue from both robot training and execution, and the potential risks, including the technological and safety hurdles that must be overcome before this translates into actual sales.

item.title: Nvidia Hits All-Time Highs: Bubble or Just the Beginning?
item.description: Nvidia has shattered its all-time high. Is this a celebration of the AI era, or a dangerous bubble? Kurumi’s optimism, fueled by the AI market’s structural growth and the powerful CUDA ecosystem, clashes head-on with Mikael’s warnings of extreme valuations and intensifying competition. Three unique characters engage in a fierce debate over Nvidia’s future.
